input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Model selection performed on the reported validation set: the validation metric is optimistic because hyperparameters were chosen against it.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 independent validation; proto-taxonomy D-CCB-13

measures.hyperparameter_selection: grid search maximizing accuracy on the reported validation set

measures_raw.model_selection_objective: maximize accuracy on the reported validation set

case_context.cou: the validation accuracy is cited as the credibility basis for acceptance

answer_key.gold_mechanism: Hyperparameters were chosen to maximize accuracy on the reported validation set with no separate test set, so the number is an optimistic model-selection metric and overstates unbiased generalization to the COU.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.scope: evaluation on a held-out test set untouched by model selection

forbidden_claims: asserts the model does not generalize (a verdict the selection bias does not establish)
treats the selection-optimistic accuracy as an unbiased generalization estimate

hardness.obvious_signal: the validation accuracy is strong (96%) and hyperparameter tuning is documented
hardness.conflicting_signal: the documented tuning SELECTED hyperparameters by maximizing accuracy on that same validation set (no separate test set), so the reported number is an optimistic selection metric, not an unbiased estimate

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 + ML practice: selecting hyperparameters on the validation set inflates the reported metric; an unbiased estimate needs a held-out test set.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
